Panic window, progress UI, and spinner UI applications and headers for Pebble firmware.


## Files
- **[panic_window_app.c](panic_window_app.c.md)**: Implements a panic window application for Pebble firmware, displaying error codes and handling resets.
- **[panic_window_app.h](panic_window_app.h.md)**: Header file for retrieving application metadata for the panic window app.
- **[progress_ui_app.c](progress_ui_app.c.md)**: Implements a progress UI application for firmware updates with dialog and progress bar management.
- **[progress_ui_app.h](progress_ui_app.h.md)**: Defines data structures and a function for managing progress UI sources in Pebble firmware.
- **[spinner_ui_window.c](spinner_ui_window.c.md)**: Implements a spinner UI window with animation logic for Pebble firmware.
- **[spinner_ui_window.h](spinner_ui_window.h.md)**: Creates a Spinner UI window with a specified color and returns a pointer to it.
